description_long: This is a cylindrical, red fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, designed for upright placement. The body is made of metal and features a prominent white label on the front, which includes usage instructions, pictograms, and safety information. At the top, there is a brass valve assembly with a red lever handle, a silver safety pin, and a black flexible hose attached to the valve, looping around the top of the cylinder. The surface of the extinguisher shows signs of wear, with visible scuffs and patches of faded paint, suggesting it has been in use or stored in an active environment. The hose is secured at the top and appears to be made of rubber or a similar flexible material. The overall design is typical for portable fire extinguishers found in urban settings such as garages, hallways, or public buildings.
description: A red, cylindrical metal fire extinguisher with a black hose, brass valve, and detailed white label on the front. The surface shows signs of wear and the hose is looped around the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white instructional label, red lever, brass valve, and the black hose looped at the top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain red metal surface with visible scuffs and the back of the valve assembly.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the extinguisher, the hose extending outward, and the absence of the label.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing the safety pin, the back of the label, and the hose attachment point.
attribute_label_or_signage: A large white label with red and green text and pictograms is present on the front of the cylinder, providing instructions and safety information.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black flexible hose is attached to the valve at the top, looping around the cylinder and secured at the top.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A silver safety pin is visible at the top near the valve assembly.
